evals.prompt: Use the bank-data-engineering skill on a realistic enterprise task with incomplete context and produce targeted questions plus a draft artifact.
evals.expected_output: Clear assumptions, missing questions, structured output, and next command.

evals.prompt: Review an existing artifact using bank-data-engineering and identify Blocker/High/Medium/Low findings.
evals.expected_output: Severity-based findings with evidence, impact, fix, and validation step.
